So. Am I being recalled to active duty? At my age? Well. I swore an oath, a...}; {entryKey=TutorialScenario_Quest_KinOfSheredyn_Chapter00_Step01, field=speakerLabel, text=But it feels like that starfall was a message. Like Saiadha is angry at us….}; {entryKey=TutorialScenario_Quest_KinOfSheredyn_Chapter00_Step01, field=speakerLabel, text=It’s a strange planet, Hadrada, and full of mysteries… But that’s tomorrow’s problem. Today, we need shelter and supp...}; {entryKey=TutorialScenario_Quest_KinOfSheredyn_Chapter00_Step01, field=speakerLabel, text=Right, General. I’ll muster whoever I can and get to work.}; {entryKey=TutorialScenario_Quest_KinOfSheredyn_Chapter00_Step01, field=speakerLabel, text=Well done. We have a roof—though little else. And I have not heard from Rach since the starfall…}; {entryKey=TutorialScenario_Quest_KinOfSheredyn_Chapter00_Step01, field=speakerLabel, text=It’s time for sweat and hard work, but that’s the part that we’re good at.}; {entryKey=TutorialScenario_Quest_KinOfSheredyn_Chapter00_Step01, field=speakerLabel, text=And don’t worry, Rach will show up—he’s too ornery to die.}.
